text:
Okay. There was once a boy named Oliver who loved golden retrievals. Once, they got onto his math owl perch. He never got those grades again.

Or maybe just that one time.

That summer he got a nice golden retriever. He named him Goldie. They went everywhere together. One day, they chased a squirrel. Goldie just snagged it.

Then a hawk.

Then an owl.

Then just Goldie. All day.

That fall they went back. And no squirrels.

And no owls.

And definitely not that hawk.

And not just Goldie.

Just an old owl.

They liked old owls.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
